title: limodorum monile
intro: Limodorum monile, also known as the nodding bur-marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The plant contains compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, offering health benefits in relieving coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Limodorum monile include teas and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
